steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that the element “go” in *gogs* gets repeated in *gogogs*.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Answer A directly repeats that idea: it says *gogogs* contains a repetition of the element “go” in *gogs*.
The other three choices either claim something not mentioned in the passage, describe a uniqueness that isn’t stated, or assert an identical meaning that the text does not support.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
